---
name: Bug report
about: A recommendation was wrong, an install command failed, or the skill misbehaved
title: "[bug] "
labels: bug
---

**What happened**
A clear description of the bug.

**What you asked cari-tools**
The need/prompt you gave it.

**What it recommended or did**
The output, including any install command.

**Expected behavior**
What should have happened instead.

**Environment**
- Claude Code version:
- Install method: [ ] plugin marketplace [ ] standalone skill
- OS:
